name: jobsearch
description: Job search pipeline — scrapers, SQLite, and Claude skills

scripts.scrape: tsx tools/scrape-yc-jobs.ts && tsx tools/scrape-yc-deep.ts && tsx tools/scrape-hn-jobs.ts && tsx tools/scrape-remoteok.ts && tsx tools/scrape-simplifyjobs.ts && python tools/scrape-jobspy.py
scripts.scrape:dry: tsx tools/scrape-yc-jobs.ts --dry && tsx tools/scrape-hn-jobs.ts --dry && tsx tools/scrape-remoteok.ts --dry && tsx tools/scrape-simplifyjobs.ts --dry
scripts.db:backup: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const d=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);fs.mkdirSync('db/backups',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('db/jobsearch.sqlite','db/backups/'+d+'.sqlite');console.log('Backed up to db/backups/'+d+'.sqlite')"

author: Dmytro Petryshchuk
